company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators.
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that uses AI to automate video editing, captioning, and publishing — so creators can focus on content, not production.

policies.detail: No refunds are issued after 7 days from the date of purchase.
24/7 live support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users receive standard email support with a 24-hour response time.
All plans are billed monthly. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time; changes take effect at the start of the next billing cycle.
A 7-day free trial is available for the Pro plan. No credit card required to start.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support for publishing?
faqs.answer: AutoStream integrates with YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and Twitter/X for direct publishing.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can cancel anytime from your account dashboard. Your access continues until the end of the billing period.

faqs.question: Is there a limit on video length?
faqs.answer: Basic plan supports videos up to 30 minutes. Pro plan supports videos up to 4 hours.
